description: Distribution of registered passenger cars by gap between first-registration year and model year. Use when user asks about used imports, pre-model-year registrations, or new-vs-used buying patterns.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1900 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= 2030 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningModelAar IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningModelAar >= 1950 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningModelAar <= 2035 | EVAL lag_years = _foerste_registrering_aar - KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningModelAar, lag_band = CASE(lag_years < 0, "Negative (next-year model)", lag_years == 0, "Same year", lag_years <= 2, "1-2 years", lag_years <= 10, "3-10 years", "11+ years") | STATS car_count = COUNT(*), avg_lag = AVG(lag_years), p50_lag = PERCENTILE(lag_years, 50), p90_lag = PERCENTILE(lag_years, 90), max_lag = MAX(lag_years) BY lag_band | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 10
